assessment.focus_note: Continuing to monitor the evolving geopolitical landscape, especially around the Iran conflict and US foreign policy shifts. Deepen understanding of the implications of AI advancements like Neuralink on individual autonomy and the emerging landscape of information integrity with platforms like Grokipedia.
